word: G2840 - κοινόω - koinóō - koy-no'-o - Call common

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κοινόω

- Transliteration: Koinoo

- Phonetic: koy-no'-o

- Definition:

1. to make common

a. to make (Levitically) unclean, render unhallowed, defile, profane

b. to declare or count unclean

- Origin: from G2839

- TDNT entry: 16:29,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2839; to make (or consider) profane (ceremonially): - call common defile pollute unclean.
